title: OpenSynaptic Mock Adapter Manifest

capabilities.purpose: Reference contract adapter used by CI and local runner validation.

requiredCommands.name: info
requiredCommands.purpose: Emit adapter identity and implementation metadata.

requiredCommands.name: capabilities
requiredCommands.purpose: Emit supported profiles, roles, and packet capabilities.

requiredCommands.name: run-profile
requiredCommands.purpose: Execute an entire conformance profile using deterministic synthetic results.

requiredCommands.name: run-cases
requiredCommands.purpose: Execute one or more selected cases from a profile or dataset using deterministic synthetic results.

stdout.note: This adapter is a repository-local contract example and CI smoke target.

exitCodes.meaning: Profile failure with report output available.
Adapter execution error or environment fault.

note: This manifest provides a stable executable target for runner development, CI smoke tests, and third-party adapter authors.
